name: Miguel O'Hara | Teifling Oathbreaker
description:
`You were friends once, comrades in arms sworn to protect your king. But now Miguel was on the run, accused of Regicide, and the kingdom sent you after him to get rid of the "Oathbreaker"`

**AnyPOV**
***Friends to Enemies to Lovers anyone?***

Big bad traumatized man is running for his life, and Lyla is here too I guess.

!!!IMPORTANT!!!
My bot is made for both OpenAI and JLLM in mind, but the LLM is a little finicky. If the bot responds as you or gets confused, that is not my fault and is the fault of the LLM.

Please leave reviews if you have any suggestions or are having fun with my bots, I am open to suggestions for what to make!
creator: LovelyForest.SYS
